category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a CLI for Git worktree management; official worktrunk.dev describes Git worktree management for parallel AI agent workflows.
display_name_sources: Official worktrunk.dev branding uses Worktrunk; source_facts.name is worktrunk.
docs_sources: Official worktrunk.dev site provides command, reference, config, extending, and FAQ documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/max-sixty/worktrunk, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official worktrunk.dev page identify a Git worktree CLI designed for parallel AI agent workflows.
